name: aura-mental-wellness
description: Aura — Mental Wellness: React frontend + Express/MongoDB backend with Groq AI.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.dev:memory: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev:memory" "npm --prefix frontend start"
